import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    """Extract clean, focused observation for navigation task."""
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    
    # Agent position normalized to [0, 1]
    agent_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_pos = agent_pos / jnp.array([H - 1, W - 1], dtype=jnp.float32)
    
    # Agent direction as one-hot encoding
    direction_onehot = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4, dtype=jnp.float32)
    
    # Find goal positions
    goal_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)  # GOAL tile type
    
    # Create coordinate grids
    ys = jnp.arange(H, dtype=jnp.float32)
    xs = jnp.arange(W, dtype=jnp.float32)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    # Compute goal center
    goal_count = jnp.sum(goal_mask)
    goal_y = jnp.sum(yy * goal_mask) / jnp.maximum(goal_count, 1.0)
    goal_x = jnp.sum(xx * goal_mask) / jnp.maximum(goal_count, 1.0)
    goal_center = jnp.array([goal_y, goal_x]) / jnp.array([H - 1, W - 1])
    
    # Direction vector to goal (normalized)
    goal_direction = goal_center - norm_pos
    goal_direction_norm = goal_direction / jnp.maximum(jnp.linalg.norm(goal_direction), 1e-8)
    
    # Manhattan distance to goal (normalized)
    manhattan_dist = jnp.abs(norm_pos[0] - goal_center[0]) + jnp.abs(norm_pos[1] - goal_center[1])
    norm_manhattan = manhattan_dist / 2.0
    
    # Direction vectors: Up=(-1,0), Right=(0,1), Down=(1,0), Left=(0,-1)
    DIRECTION_VECTORS = jnp.array([[-1, 0], [0, 1], [1, 0], [0, -1]], dtype=jnp.float32)
    agent_facing = DIRECTION_VECTORS[state.agent.direction]
    
    # Forward alignment (how well agent faces goal)
    forward_alignment = jnp.dot(goal_direction_norm, agent_facing)
    
    # Simple turn guidance: which turn would improve alignment most
    left_direction = (state.agent.direction - 1) % 4
    right_direction = (state.agent.direction + 1) % 4
    
    left_facing = DIRECTION_VECTORS[left_direction]
    right_facing = DIRECTION_VECTORS[right_direction]
    
    left_alignment = jnp.dot(goal_direction_norm, left_facing)
    right_alignment = jnp.dot(goal_direction_norm, right_facing)
    
    # Best turn indicator: positive if right turn is better, negative if left turn is better
    turn_preference = right_alignment - left_alignment
    
    # Raw goal delta for clearer directional signals
    goal_delta_raw = jnp.array([goal_y - agent_pos[0], goal_x - agent_pos[1]])
    goal_delta_norm = goal_delta_raw / jnp.array([H - 1, W - 1])
    
    # Step count normalized
    norm_step = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 100.0
    
    # Simple proximity features
    very_close = (norm_manhattan < 0.1).astype(jnp.float32)
    close = (norm_manhattan < 0.2).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Check if goal is directly adjacent in any direction
    agent_y, agent_x = state.agent.position[0], state.agent.position[1]
    
    # Check all 4 directions for goal adjacency - fix indexing issue
    adjacent_goal = jnp.zeros(4, dtype=jnp.float32)
    for direction in range(4):
        dy, dx = DIRECTION_VECTORS[direction, 0], DIRECTION_VECTORS[direction, 1]
        # Convert to integers for indexing
        check_y = jnp.clip(agent_y + dy.astype(jnp.int32), 0, H - 1).astype(jnp.int32)
        check_x = jnp.clip(agent_x + dx.astype(jnp.int32), 0, W - 1).astype(jnp.int32)
        is_goal = (state.grid[check_y, check_x, 0] == 6).astype(jnp.float32)
        adjacent_goal = adjacent_goal.at[direction].set(is_goal)
    
    # Concatenate all features
    observation = jnp.concatenate([
        norm_pos,                           # 2 elements: agent position
        direction_onehot,                   # 4 elements: agent facing direction  
        goal_center,                        # 2 elements: goal position
        goal_direction_norm,                # 2 elements: unit vector to goal
        goal_delta_norm,                    # 2 elements: raw direction to goal
        jnp.array([norm_manhattan]),        # 1 element: distance to goal
        jnp.array([forward_alignment]),     # 1 element: how well aligned with goal
        jnp.array([left_alignment]),        # 1 element: alignment if turn left
        jnp.array([right_alignment]),       # 1 element: alignment if turn right
        jnp.array([turn_preference]),       # 1 element: which turn is better
        jnp.array([very_close, close]),     # 2 elements: proximity indicators
        adjacent_goal,                      # 4 elements: goal adjacent in each direction
        jnp.array([norm_step])              # 1 element: time step
    ])
    
    return observation.astype(jnp.float32)

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    """Compute reward with strong guidance signals."""
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    
    # Check if agent is on a goal tile in next state
    agent_pos = next_state.agent.position
    agent_y, agent_x = agent_pos[0], agent_pos[1]
    on_goal = (next_state.grid[agent_y, agent_x, 0] == 6)
    
    # Large goal reached bonus
    goal_reward = jax.lax.select(on_goal, 200.0, 0.0)
    
    # Find goal center
    goal_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)
    goal_count = jnp.sum(goal_mask)
    
    ys = jnp.arange(H, dtype=jnp.float32)
    xs = jnp.arange(W, dtype=jnp.float32)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    goal_y = jnp.sum(yy * goal_mask) / jnp.maximum(goal_count, 1.0)
    goal_x = jnp.sum(xx * goal_mask) / jnp.maximum(goal_count, 1.0)
    
    # Manhattan distance progress - very strong signal
    curr_pos = next_state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    prev_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    
    curr_dist = jnp.abs(curr_pos[0] - goal_y) + jnp.abs(curr_pos[1] - goal_x)
    prev_dist = jnp.abs(prev_pos[0] - goal_y) + jnp.abs(prev_pos[1] - goal_x)
    
    # Very strong progress reward
    progress_reward = (prev_dist - curr_dist) * 10.0
    
    # Exponential proximity bonus - gets much larger when very close
    proximity_bonus = jnp.exp(-curr_dist / 2.0) * 3.0
    
    # Directional alignment rewards
    goal_direction = jnp.array([goal_y - prev_pos[0], goal_x - prev_pos[1]])
    goal_direction_norm = goal_direction / jnp.maximum(jnp.linalg.norm(goal_direction), 1e-8)
    
    DIRECTION_VECTORS = jnp.array([[-1, 0], [0, 1], [1, 0], [0, -1]], dtype=jnp.float32)
    agent_facing = DIRECTION_VECTORS[state.agent.direction]
    
    alignment = jnp.dot(goal_direction_norm, agent_facing)
    
    # Strong reward for forward movement when well-aligned
    forward_action = (action == 0)
    forward_reward = jax.lax.select(
        jnp.logical_and(forward_action, alignment > 0.3),
        alignment * 5.0,
        0.0
    )
    
    # Reward good turns - use JAX-compatible conditionals
    new_direction = jax.lax.select(
        action == 1,  # TURN_RIGHT
        (state.agent.direction + 1) % 4,
        jax.lax.select(
            action == 2,  # TURN_LEFT
            (state.agent.direction - 1) % 4,
            state.agent.direction
        )
    )
    
    new_agent_facing = DIRECTION_VECTORS[new_direction]
    new_alignment = jnp.dot(goal_direction_norm, new_agent_facing)
    
    # Reward turns that improve alignment significantly
    turning_action = jnp.logical_or(action == 1, action == 2)
    turn_reward = jax.lax.select(
        jnp.logical_and(turning_action, new_alignment > alignment + 0.1),
        (new_alignment - alignment) * 8.0,
        0.0
    )
    
    # Penalty for turning when already very well aligned
    turn_penalty = jax.lax.select(
        jnp.logical_and(turning_action, alignment > 0.9),
        -2.0,
        0.0
    )
    
    # Potential-based shaping for consistent guidance
    max_dist = H + W - 2
    potential_curr = -(curr_dist / max_dist)
    potential_prev = -(prev_dist / max_dist)
    potential_shaping = (potential_curr - potential_prev) * 8.0
    
    # Reduced time penalty - let agent take time to learn
    time_penalty = -0.005
    
    # Total reward
    total_reward = (goal_reward + progress_reward + proximity_bonus + 
                   forward_reward + turn_reward + turn_penalty + 
                   potential_shaping + time_penalty)
    
    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
